def positive_test_function_covers_multiple_unrelated_scenarios():
    rule_id = "test_function_covers_multiple_unrelated_scenarios"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Integration or unit test body covers multiple unrelated scenarios without parameterization."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
